
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 1 - "Introducing PostScript".

The examples for this chapter require 47 KB.
		
Files contained in this folder:
	Manifest
	circle.ps
	clipping.ps
	color.ps
	crest.ps
	ellipse1.ps
	ellipse2.ps
	filledZ.ps (*)
	fonts.ps
	gstates.ps (*)
	halftone.ps
	opaque.ps (*)
	path1.ps
	path2.ps
	path3.ps
	path4.ps (*)
	pattern.ps (*)
	ps.ps
	ps_sign.ps (1)
	pscube.ps
	showmsg1.ps
	showmsg2.ps (*)
	showmsg3.ps
	triangl1.ps
	triangl2.ps
	triangl3.ps

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	ps_sign.ps in the printed copy of the book contained the procedure
	definition for the inch procedure which the example did not use. This
	example omits that procedure definition.
	
